extract: Kecleon (Japanese: カクレオン Kakureon) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation III. It is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon. Kecleon, along with Wailmer and Azurill, was one of the first Generation III Pokémon revealed, on March 7, 2001. In Pokémon Ruby, Sapphire, Emerald, Omega Ruby, and Alpha Sapphire, invisible wild Kecleon are present in certain locations, sometimes acting as obstacles blocking the path, and can only be revealed and battled through the use of the Devon Scope.
